====================================================================================================
SSD1306Ascii
====================================================================================================

The full source code files located in this directory and its subdirectories were downloaded from the
GitHub repository:

    https://github.com/greiman/SSD1306Ascii
    https://github.com/greiman/SSD1306Ascii/releases
    https://github.com/greiman/SSD1306Ascii/archive/refs/tags/1.3.5.tar.gz

~~~ Last accessed & checked on 2025-04-23         ~~~
~~~ Last GIT commit         on 2023-02-13         ~~~
~~~ Last GIT release tag    on 2023-02-13 (1.3.5) ~~~

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Some files and directories that are not strictly required for the running of the library are not
included here to save space.

Since the library source code files will be included directly from the sketch file using '#include',
the 'library.properties' file is also not included here.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SSD1306Ascii is an unbuffered character only library for small OLED displays like the Adafruit 1.3"
and 0.96" Monochrome displays.

Copyright (c) 2011-2023 Bill Greiman

Licensed under the MIT License. Please refer to the source code for more details.

====================================================================================================
